problem id: ac7ed6cf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(6) OR NOT SHR(3)

examples:
  11010011 -> 11100111
  00001100 -> 11111110
  11000000 -> 11100111
  11011011 -> 11100111
  01100110 -> 11110011
  10010111 -> 11101111
  01101011 -> 11110011
  01001010 -> 11110111
  10000011 -> 11101111

query: 11011000
predicted answer: 11100111
